Name: Karikari
Notes: A small enemy that will chase after the player if they get too close. It will try to stick to the player's body to damage them. The player can get rid of them by using a Spin Attack. If shot by a Star Bit, it will drop three Star Bits instead of one. Additionally, this enemy can be defeated by: the Fire, Rainbow and Rock power-ups, the Spin Drill, explosions, coconuts, Stretch Plants, Topmen, Koopa Shells, Spiny projectiles, and Silver Chomps. This enemy will not drop anything if crushed by a Silver Chomp.

SW_APPEAR.Description: Appears when this switch is activated.

SW_AWAKE.Description: Enables rendering and resumes updates when this switch is active.

Player2Targetable.Description: Can be targeted, frozen and defeated by player 2.
